action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Snodgrass, Mayadev, Andraca, Arney, Bare, DeSmidt, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Hong, J. Jacobson, Joers, Kirsch, Madison, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Phelps, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Stroud, Stubbs and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Smith, Spreitzer, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Ratcliff, Roys and Larson
